plugins.name: unity-worktree
plugins.description: Persistent, reusable git worktree pool for Unity projects — keeps Library/Temp/obj caches warm across branch switches

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Status line with model/git/time header plus gradient gauges for context window and 5-hour rate limit — cross-platform (jq or PowerShell fallback)

plugins.name: google-chat-send
plugins.description: Send messages and notifications to a team Google Chat Space via incoming webhooks — named webhooks per purpose, duplicate-send guard, strict secret handling

plugins.name: csharp-solid-principles
plugins.description: SOLID principles checklist for C# — SRP/OCP/LSP/ISP/DIP with violation examples, refactorings, and detection patterns (Korean, idiomatic C#/.NET)
